name: applying-brand-guidelines
tagline: Corporate brand style guide (Acme Corp) with exact colors, fonts, and layout rules for PowerPoint/Excel/PDF, plus optional apply/validate.
verdict: Extremely concrete and deterministic style spec with worked phrase/format examples. Weak spots: no trigger phrasing or scope exclusions, no failure handling for the apply/validate scripts, unclear re-run safety for logo/branding insertion, and no real version signal.

highlights.summary: Description states what it does but gives no 'use when' trigger phrasing.
No 'NOT for' / exclusion text anywhere in the skill.
No guidance for missing logo asset, failed validate_brand.py run, or undefined color/element cases.
